creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
version 1.0 will not build properly on 9.0-CURRENT .  This update to the comms/uarduno port includes updated source that addresses the build issue.  Updated source is reported to have worked properly under 9.0-CURRENT.  Port revision bump to 1.01 .

Fix: see attached 'shar' archive for update

Patch attached with submission follows:
